title: Vitax Growmore, General Purpose Fertiliser, Suitable For Fruit, Veg, Flowers And Lawn, Promotes Heavy Crops, Boosts Growth All Around The Garden- 1.25Kg
features: GENERAL PURPOSE FERTILISER: Vitax Growmore is a popular, all-purpose fertiliser designed to support strong and healthy plant growth throughout your garden.
FAST ACTING: Vitax Growmore Fertiliser Delivers quick results, boosting plant development and enhancing growth rates.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for fruits, vegetables, and flowers, Vitax Growmore is also ideal for use before laying turf or sowing grass seed, ensuring optimal soil preparation.
HEAVY CROP PROMOTION: Encourages heavy crops of fruit and vegetables, vigorous plant growth, and vibrant flowers, making it a comprehensive choice for various garden needs.

EASY APPLICATION: Apply evenly and fork or hoe into the top surface of the soil. Reapply every 8-10 weeks as a top dressing, avoiding contact with leaves and stems for best results. Contains superphosphate and nitrogen for balanced nourishment.
